zh.Walsham-le-Willows, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Holmes於1477年出生在英國素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯時，她的父親Robert Holme27歲，母親Margaret Constable26歲。她於1495年與John Hawes在英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1528年9月27日在她的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Holmes于1477年出生在英国素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯时，她的父亲Robert Holme27岁，母亲Margaret Constable26岁。她于1495年与John Hawes在英国英格兰素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1528年9月27日在她的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holmes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either from the plural form of Holme , or else a variant of Holme or Home , with excrescent -s (see Holm ).

Scottish: probably a habitational name from Holmes near Dundonald (Ayrshire), or possibly from another place so called in the barony of Inchestuir (Angus). Both placenames likely derive from the plural form of Middle English, Older Scots holm ‘islet, raised land in a marsh’ (see Holm ).

Scottish and Irish: adopted for Scottish Gaelic and Irish Mac Thómais, Mac Thómais (see McComb ). In parts of western Ireland, Holmes is also a variant of Cavish, from Gaelic Mac Thámhais, another patronymic from Thomas . Early bearers in Ireland were probably immigrants from Scotland.

variants.name: Holme
meanings: English (northwestern England): variant of   Holm   and of   Home   3 and 4.
Danish and Swedish: variant of   Holm   1.

variants.name: Homes
meanings: English: variant of   Holmes   and   Home  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Holmes was born in 1477, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, her father, Robert Holme, was 27 and her mother, Margaret Constable, was 26. She married John Hawes in 1495, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 27 September 1528, in her hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Holmes est née en 1477, à Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Holme, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Constable, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Hawes en 1495, à Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 septembre 1528, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Holmes(이)가 1477년 영국 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Holme(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Constable(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 John Hawes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1528년 9월 27일 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Walsham Le Willows, Suffolk, England: валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Holmes родилась в 1477 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Holme было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Constable, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hawes в 1495 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 27 сентября 1528 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год.
